description:
Radio Automation is a purpose built audio player for an off hour animated light show.

Radio Automation is a purpose built audio player designed to be a off hours music player for my animated light display during the holidays.
Bug Fixes
- Cleanup: Address minor code quality issues (650e9c0)
- Cleanup: Address nullability issues in Audio Project (497cfb9)
- Validaton: Add better preference page validation (482cc83)
- Volume: Fix bug in setting initial audio volume at startup (6f968e6)
Documentation
- Remove old requirement doc (736ef7f)
